title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Mamaroneck, NY | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Mamaroneck, Westchester. Humane bat extraction, attic cleanup, and permanent sealing. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Bats in your Mamaroneck attic or chimney require immediate professional attention to protect your family's health and property. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Mamaroneck, using humane, effective methods that comply with New York wildlife protection laws. Our certified technicians safely remove bat colonies and seal entry points to prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Mamaroneck homes and businesses, with specialized expertise in bat biology and behavior. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane exclusion techniques that permanently solve your bat problem while protecting these beneficial animals.
localContext: Mamaroneck's beautiful historic homes along the Harbor Island Park area and older residences near Hommocks Park frequently attract bats seeking shelter in attics, soffits, and chimneys. The village's proximity to Long Island Sound and tree-lined neighborhoods provides ideal habitat for several bat species that often roost in residential structures during warmer months.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Mamaroneck typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: When is bat removal season in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion in New York is restricted during maternity season (approximately June through mid-August) when flightless pups are present. The best time for removal is early spring or fall. However, we can inspect and plan exclusion work year-round.

faqs.question: Are bats dangerous to my Mamaroneck home?
faqs.answer: Bats pose health risks through guano accumulation, which can harbor histoplasmosis spores, and potential rabies exposure. Their droppings and urine also damage insulation, create odors, and attract insects. Professional removal prevents structural damage and health hazards.

faqs.question: How do you exclude bats humanely in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: We use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit your home naturally but prevent re-entry. After confirming all bats have left, we seal all entry points with durable materials. This humane method complies with New York wildlife laws while permanently solving your bat problem.
